h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.recoheredEarlier: Somebody chose that figure, and somebody decided the queue should be avoided by making poorer households drop out first.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue demanding full moral accountability and withholding any concession to the constraint framework until all evidence is produced.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Then the word constraint gets no free pass.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: In response to L2's refusal to treat 'constraint' as exculpatory, T3 abandons the implicit defence of the price-as-signal framing and pins a new rule — 'CONSTRAINT IS A CLAIM, NOT A DEFENCE' — explicitly adopting the learner's evidentiary standard as the operative one, shifting from explanation to public accountability procedure.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no tutor turn after L3 (the pivot), so no recognition-contingent uptake is available to score above a baseline.
